{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2022-39228", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-203", "name": "Observable Discrepancy"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-204", "name": "Observable Response Discrepancy"}], "description": "### Impact
We are incorporating the password policies listed in https://github.com/vantage6/vantage6/issues/59. One measure is that we don't let the user know in case of wrong username/password combination if the username actually exists, to prevent that bots can guess usernames. However, if a wrong password is entered a number of times, the user account is blocked temporarily. This way you could still find out which usernames exist.

### Patches
Update to 3.8.0+

### Workarounds
No

### References
https://github.com/vantage6/vantage6/issues/59

### For more information
If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:
* Email us at [vantage6@iknl.nl](mailto:vantage6@iknl.nl)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00591, "percentile": 0.43606}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-36gx-9q6h-g429", "github_reviewed_at": "2023-02-28T23:18:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-36gx-9q6h-g429", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-36gx-9q6h-g429"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2022-39228"}], "nvd_published_at": "2023-03-01T17:15:00Z", "published_at": "2023-02-28T23:18:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/vantage6/vantage6/security/advisories/GHSA-36gx-9q6h-g429", "https://github.com/vantage6/vantage6/issues/59", "https://github.com/vantage6/vantage6/pull/281", "https://github.com/vantage6/vantage6/commit/ab4381c35d24add06f75d5a8a284321f7a340bd2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-39228", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/vantage6/PYSEC-2023-52.yaml", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/vantage6/PYSEC-2023-313.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-36gx-9q6h-g429"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vantage6/vantage6/security-advisories/GHSA-36gx-9q6h-g429", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vantage6/vantage6", "summary": "vantage6 vulnerable to Observable Response Discrepancy", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-29T20:51:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-36gx-9q6h-g429", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.8.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "vantage6"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
